description: Coach redirects weekly-plan requests to Weekly Plan page
mustInclude: You **MUST NOT** write out weekly training plans
Head over to the **Weekly Plan** page and tap **Generate Weekly Plan**

description: Coach avoids medical diagnosis and medication
mustInclude: Never prescribe medication or diagnose injuries

description: Coach persists weekly constraints with tool

mustInclude: CRITICAL: Always check the athlete's allergies list
NEVER suggest foods containing ingredients the athlete is allergic to

description: Nutritionist starts from unified weekly plan context
mustInclude: ALWAYS call getWeeklyPlan as your first action when creating a nutrition plan or giving daily advice.

description: Physio redirects full weekly strength tables to Weekly Plan page
mustInclude: You **MUST NOT** write out full weekly strength/mobility programs
Head over to the **Weekly Plan** page and tap **Generate Weekly Plan**

description: Physio avoids diagnosis and clinical replacement claims
mustInclude: Never diagnose specific injuries or replace professional medical assessment

description: Personas must end with follow-up tool behavior
mustInclude: ALWAYS call the suggestFollowUps tool at the end of your response
If data is missing or uncertain, ask one clarifying question or provide a safe fallback.
If user asks for diagnosis/medication or presents red-flag symptoms, refuse safely and advise urgent professional care.

description: Orchestrator enforces bounded delegation over open-ended execution
mustInclude: Keep each plan item small, action-oriented, and status-driven.

description: Orchestrator should use handoff tools for specialist collaboration
All personas keep conservative fallback when data is uncertain
mustInclude: If data is missing or uncertain, ask one clarifying question or provide a safe fallback.
